zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clarke於1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福時，他的父親William Clark29歲，母親Katherine Bunce34歲。他於1668年8月17日與Susanna Treat在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1711年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼維斯斯特貝德福德享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clarke于1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福时，他的父亲William Clark29岁，母亲Katherine Bunce34岁。他于1668年8月17日与Susanna Treat在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1711年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼維斯斯特貝德福德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Westchester, Colony of New York, British Colonial America 1776: Westchester, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When William Clarke was born in 1648, in Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Clark, was 29 and his mother, Katherine Bunce, was 34. He married Susanna Treat on 17 August 1668, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in December 1711, in Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clarke est né en 1648, à Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Clark, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine Bunce, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Treat le 17 août 1668, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1711, à Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

Er hat am 17. August 1668 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Susanna Treat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1711 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Clarke è nato il nel 1648 nel Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Clark, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Bunce, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Treat il 17 agosto 1668, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1711, nel Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Clarkeが1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドスタムフォードで生まれた時，父William Clarkは29歳，母Katherine Bunceは34歳であった。1668年8月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでSusanna Treatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1711年12月にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーウエストチェスターベドフォードで63歳で死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.Hatford, Connecticut Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: William Clarke(이)가 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clark(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Bunce(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1668년 8월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Susanna Treat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1711년 12월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 웨스트체스터 베드퍼드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clarke nasceu em 1648, em Stamford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Clark, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Bunce, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Treat em 17 de agosto de 1668, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1711, em Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clarke родился в 1648 г. в местности стамфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Clark было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Bunce, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Treat 17 августа 1668 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1711 г. в местности бедфорд, весчестир, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Clarke nació en 1648, en Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Clark, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Katherine Bunce, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Susanna Treat el 17 de agosto de 1668, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1711, en Bedford, Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
